title: culcitium dasyphyllum
intro: Culcitium dasyphyllum, also known as the woolly culcitium, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Culcitium dasyphyllum include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine.
